name: jquery-pin-it-button-for-images
description: Build scripts for jQuery Pin It Button for Images WordPress plugin

scripts.zip: npm run build && cp -r plugin jquery-pin-it-button-for-images && zip -r jquery-pin-it-button-for-images-$npm_package_version.zip jquery-pin-it-button-for-images && rm -rf jquery-pin-it-button-for-images
scripts.dev: while true; do inotifywait -e modify src/js/jpibfi.client.js 2>/dev/null && npm run build; done
